notes:
feat(desktop): adaptive FlowRow layouts and wider invoice header gap

- Replace fixed Rows (filter chips, button groups, screen headers) with
  FlowRow so controls wrap instead of clipping on narrow panes
- Drop the horizontal scroll around order status chips that prevented
  wrapping
- Add modifier parameter to StatusFilterChips and StatCard FlowRow content
- Spread supplier/recipient blocks to page corners in PDF invoices with
  a 20% gap between columns (desktop and backend generators)
